---
title: "Casual Inference"
toc: false
---

::: {.hero-section}

![](images/profile-placeholder.png){.profile-photo fig-alt="Photo of Jonathan Pearce"}

# Welcome to Casual Inference

Hello! I'm **Jonathan Pearce**. I work in the areas of data analytics, machine learning, and statistics.
This site is a place to share my projects, blog posts, datasets, and resources.

[GitHub](https://github.com/Jonathan-Pearce){.btn .btn-outline-light .btn-sm}
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jonathan-pearce){.btn .btn-outline-light .btn-sm}

:::

---
